PowerShell($body = '{"tool":"tasks.create","input":{"title":"Brush teeth before sleep","start_date":"2026-06-07T21:30:00Z","end_date":"2026-06-07T21:35:00Z","daily_start_time":"21:30:00","daily_end_time":"21:35:00","tags":["evening","routine"]}}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://dailygoalmap.vercel.app/api/mcp" -Method POST -Headers @{"Content-Type"="application/json";"X-Project-Api-Key"="dgm_wvoVvvWM91JajBO9qnDxdlAi3J8Pc6sn"} -Body $body; Write-Output "ok=$\($r.ok\) status=$\($r.status\) id=$\($r.result.task.id\) title=$\($r.result.task.title\)")

PowerShell($body = '{"tool":"tasks.update","input":{"task_id":"9eda85c4-695c-4aa0-ac53-07e0d3002682","start_date":"2026-06-07T14:30:00Z","end_date":"2026-06-07T14:35:00Z","daily_start_time":"21:30:00","daily_end_time":"21:35:00"}}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://dailygoalmap.vercel.app/api/mcp" -Method POST -Headers @{"Content-Type"="application/json";"X-Project-Api-Key"="dgm_wvoVvvWM91JajBO9qnDxdlAi3J8Pc6sn"} -Body $body; Write-Output "ok=$\($r.ok\) status=$\($r.status\) start=$\($r.result.task.start_date\)")
